description: Heatmap of average SPG score by SBE region (rows) and year (columns), 2019 to 2023, shaded light grey to teal where darker means higher. The 2020 and 2021 columns are absent because no grades were issued during COVID; 2022–23 cells are lighter than 2019 in every region.

title.text: Average SPG score by region and year
title.subtitle: A sequential palette earns its keep where position can't carry magnitude — here color does. Darker = higher (dark-is-more). No grades were issued in 2020–21, so that column is simply absent.

usermeta.source: Source: NCDPI sample school data, SY2019–2023. Style-guide demo.
